notableEvents.label: Wilyer Abreu GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Wilyer Abreu grounds into a double play, shortstop Gunnar Henderson to first baseman Pete Alonso. Masataka Yoshida out at 2nd. Wilyer Abreu out at 1st.
